name: Pumpkin Pie Tunnel Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/4 cup brown sugar and next 4 ingredients in a small bowl; stir well, and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine remaining cup brown sugar and oil. Beat well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add egg whites; beat well.
4. In another bowl, combine flour and next 3 ingredients. Add to the brown sugar mixture alternately with buttermilk, beginning and ending with flour mixture. Mix after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla. Reserve 2 cups of batter, and set aside.
6. Pour remaining batter into a 12-cup Bundt pan coated with cooking spray.
7. Spoon pumpkin mixture evenly over center of batter to form a ring.
8. Pour reserved batter over pumpkin mixture.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in pan for 10 minutes; remove from pan and cool on a wire rack.
11. Combine powdered sugar and next 2 ingredients; stir well. Drizzle over cake.
Title: Pumpkin Pie Tunnel Cake
